title: maxillaria lasallei
intro: Maxillaria lasallei, also known as the 'Lasalle's Maxillaria', is a species of orchid native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Maxillaria lasallei are said to include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
